commands.review_summary:
The PR adds one Vitest regression case for doctor repair of multi-agent legacy `openai-codex/gpt-5.5` config refs, Codex runtime policy preservation, and restrictive `plugins.allow` repair.

PR surface: Tests +48. Total +48 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. we have a high-confidence source/proof path, but I did not run tests in this read-only review. The PR body shows a redacted real Windows 2026.6.1 doctor repair before/after, and current-main source shows the same helper path performs the asserted rewrites.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the patch is focused and I found no actionable code defect for automation to fix.
